steps.title: Identify opposite and adjacent
steps.content: Since $A$ and $B$ are acute in right triangle $ABC$, the right angle is at $C$. Relative to angle $B$, side $AC$ is opposite and side $BC$ is adjacent.

steps.title: Use the tangent ratio
steps.content:
Use tangent as opposite over adjacent.
$$\tan B=\frac{AC}{BC}$$
Substitute the given values.
$$\frac{1}{4}=\frac{24.6}{BC}$$

steps.title: Solve for the side length
steps.content:
Multiply both sides by $BC$, then multiply by $4$.
$$BC=24.6\cdot4=98.4$$
The answer is B.
